# forme

> forme is a Hebrew-language platform for designing open brass bracelets and
> rings from a plain-language description. You describe a cutout pattern in
> words; an AI generates it, automatically checks it is manufacturable
> (bridge widths, hole sizes, margins, roll-forming survivability), and
> exports a laser-cutting file (DXF in millimetres).

## Product
- Material: C260 brass, 1.5 mm, fiber-laser cut, roll-formed into an open arc.
- Products: open bracelet, open ring.
- Made to order.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://studio.powdercoat.co.il/): what forme is and how to start.
- [How it works](https://studio.powdercoat.co.il/how-it-works): the four steps — describe, generate, production check, export.
- [Gallery](https://studio.powdercoat.co.il/gallery): illustrative pattern styles.
- [FAQ](https://studio.powdercoat.co.il/faq): material, sizes, ordering.
- [Studio](https://studio.powdercoat.co.il/studio): the design tool itself.
- [Contact](https://studio.powdercoat.co.il/contact): reach the team.

## Notes
- Pricing and lead time are quoted per design on request.
- Gallery images are decorative illustrations, not products for sale.
